name: add_react_component
avoid: do not mix container and presentational logic
brief_template:
To add a React component:
1. Choose location: src/components/ or src/app/ (Next.js)
2. Define Props interface/type
3. Use functional component with hooks (useState, useEffect)
4. Extract shared logic into custom hooks or utils
5. Style: CSS modules, Tailwind, styled-components, or CSS-in-JS
6. Add test: React Testing Library + vitest/jest
7. Add Storybook story if design system exists
